# CardProc

> International Stripe payment processing from 1.5%

CardProc helps businesses accept payments worldwide via Stripe.

## Summary

- Service: Stripe payment processing, warmed accounts, company + bank + Stripe setup
- Commission: from 1.5%
- Uptime: 99.9% with Payment routing failover
- Experience: 7 years with Stripe, 1100+ accounts, $53M+ client volume
- Withdrawals: EUR, USD, PLN, USDT and more
- Languages: Russian (default), English
- Contact: hello@cardproc.com, Telegram @cardproc

## Key pages

- Home: /
- Blog: /blog
- Privacy policy: /privacy
- Contact form: /#kontakt

## Services

1. Turnkey infrastructure: foreign entity, bank account, Stripe account
2. Payment processing for any niche from 1.5%
3. Warmed Stripe accounts with turnover
4. Free expert consultation and 24/7 Telegram support

## Sections on homepage

- /#services — Services
- /#advantages — Advantages (uptime, accounts, tax, CRM, niches, withdrawals)
- /#how-we-work — How we work
- /#accounts — Accounts in operation
- /#specialists — CardProc specialists
- /#clients — Client niches
- /#kontakt — Contact form
